## NetworkResponseEvent type

Fired when a network response has been received.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type NetworkResponseEvent = {
    type: NetworkRequestType;
    response: NetworkResponse;
};
```
**References:** [NetworkRequestType](/reference/cmaf-lite.networkrequesttype)<!-- -->, [NetworkResponse](/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponse)
